title: Itertools, Infinite Streams, and Bounded Pipelines · Pipeline Retrieval
summary: Create schedule combinations and rolling windows without materializing an unbounded search space. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a lazy scheduling and windowing toolkit after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Combine chain, repeat, cycle, count, and islice with explicit termination.
Sort or otherwise establish adjacency before using groupby for complete groups.
Estimate product, permutation, and combination growth before enumeration.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')

# Extend one pure, lazy, tested pipeline increment per activity.

steps.title: Itertools Building Blocks · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — A one-pass sensor iterator yields [4, 7, malformed, 12, 17]. Consume at most 6 records, report malformed input, and never restart or materialize the open-ended source.

Which action demonstrates Itertools Building Blocks without dropping earlier contracts?
